summary: Tested Structured Memorization Record feature. All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend components (SessionNotesDialog, StudentProgress, StudentProfileModal) verified via code review and API testing. The feature correctly validates Surah/Ayah inputs against Quran data, stores teacher_name with progress entries, and allows all teachers to see all student notes.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' in monthly attendance chart - minor React key warning, not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/quran/surahs returns all 114 surahs with number, name, ayah_count
VERIFIED: POST /sessions/{id}/notes validates surah_name against QURAN_SURAHS dict
VERIFIED: POST /sessions/{id}/notes validates from_ayah/to_ayah range against surah's ayah_count
VERIFIED: POST /sessions/{id}/notes adds teacher_name and surah_number to progress records
VERIFIED: GET /students/{id}/progress returns sessions_with_notes from ALL teachers (no teacher_id filter)
VERIFIED: GET /students/{id}/progress enriches progress_log entries with teacher_name
VERIFIED: GET /teacher/student-profile/{id} returns memorization.progress_log with teacher names
VERIFIED: SessionNotesDialog.jsx has Surah Select dropdown with search functionality
VERIFIED: SessionNotesDialog.jsx has dynamic ayah range limits based on selected surah
VERIFIED: StudentProgress.jsx displays teacher_name on progress entries
VERIFIED: StudentProfileModal.jsx displays structured memorization progress_log
seed_data_creation: Added test memorization progress entry for student user_7fd1462b88ea (موسى الشبيب) - Surah الفاتحة, Ayah 1-7, Quality: ممتاز
context_for_next_testing_agent: Structured Memorization Record feature fully tested. Backend endpoints validated: /api/quran/surahs, /api/sessions/{id}/notes, /api/students/{id}/progress, /api/teacher/student-profile/{id}. All validation logic working correctly. Frontend components pass lint checks. The app uses Arabic (RTL) layout.
